samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter for serial input.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg type="explicit" id="dout_valid">Valid output signal for the output data.</reg>
            <reg type="explicit" id="dout_parallel">Parallel output data.</reg>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <when condition="rst_n == 0">
                        <assignment>Reset the counter.</assignment>
                        <assignment>Set the output data to 0.</assignment>
                    </when>
                    <when condition="din_valid == 1">
                        <assignment>Increment the counter.</assignment>
                        <if condition="cnt == 8">
                            <assignment>Reset the counter.</assignment>
                            <assignment>Set the output data to the input data.</assignment>
                            <assignment>Set valid output signal to 1.</assignment>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assignment>Shift the input data into the output data.</assignment>
                            <assignment>Set valid output signal to 0.</assignment>
                        </else>
                    </when>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
